org.apache.dubbo.common.lang

接口 Prioritized

  • 所有超级接口:
    Comparable<Prioritized>
    所有已知子接口:
    AnnotatedMethodParameterProcessor, ConditionalEventListener<E>, Converter<S,T>, EventListener<E>, LoadingStrategy, MetadataServiceExporter, MultiValueConverter<S>, ServiceDiscovery, ServiceInstanceCustomizer, ShutdownHookCallback, StringConverter<T>, StringToMultiValueConverter, SubscribedURLsSynthesizer, TypeBuilder
    所有已知实现类:
    AbstractAnnotatedMethodParameterProcessor, AbstractRequestAnnotationParameterProcessor, AbstractServiceDiscovery, ArrayTypeBuilder, CollectionTypeBuilder, ConfigurableMetadataServiceExporter, ConsulServiceDiscovery, DefaultValueParameterProcessor, DubboInternalLoadingStrategy, DubboLoadingStrategy, EnumTypeBuilder, EtcdServiceDiscovery, EurekaServiceDiscovery, FileSystemServiceDiscovery, FormParamParameterProcessor, GenericEventListener, HeaderParamParameterProcessor, LoggingEventListener, LoggingEventListener, MapTypeBuilder, MatrixParamParameterProcessor, MetadataServiceURLParamsMetadataCustomizer, MultipleRegistryServiceDiscovery, NacosServiceDiscovery, ParamAnnotationParameterProcessor, ProtocolPortsMetadataCustomizer, QueryParamParameterProcessor, RequestHeaderParameterProcessor, RequestParamParameterProcessor, RestProtocolSubscribedURLsSynthesizer, ServiceInstanceMetadataCustomizer, ServiceInstancePortCustomizer, ServiceInstancesChangedListener, ServicesLoadingStrategy, SofaRegistryServiceDiscovery, StringToArrayConverter, StringToBlockingDequeConverter, StringToBlockingQueueConverter, StringToBooleanConverter, StringToCharacterConverter, StringToCharArrayConverter, StringToCollectionConverter, StringToDequeConverter, StringToDoubleConverter, StringToFloatConverter, StringToIntegerConverter, StringToIterableConverter, StringToListConverter, StringToLongConverter, StringToNavigableSetConverter, StringToOptionalConverter, StringToQueueConverter, StringToSetConverter, StringToShortConverter, StringToSortedSetConverter, StringToStringConverter, StringToTransferQueueConverter, ZookeeperServiceDiscovery

    public interface Prioritized
extends Comparable<Prioritized>
    Prioritized interface can be implemented by objects that should be sorted, for example the tasks in executable queue.
    从以下版本开始:
    2.7.5

    • 字段概要

      字段 
      限定符和类型 字段和说明
      static Comparator<Object> COMPARATOR
      The Comparator of Prioritized
      static int MAX_PRIORITY
      The maximum priority
      static int MIN_PRIORITY
      The minimum priority
      static int NORMAL_PRIORITY
      Normal Priority

    • 方法概要

      限定符和类型 方法和说明
      default int compareTo(Prioritized that) 
      default int getPriority()
      Get the priority

    • 方法详细资料

      • getPriority

        default int getPriority()
        Get the priority
        返回:
        the default is NORMAL_PRIORITY

      • compareTo

        default int compareTo(Prioritized that)
        指定者:
        compareTo 在接口中 Comparable<Prioritized>
